## edu-cli paper past edit

Edit a past paper (修改真题)

```
edu-cli paper past edit [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --code-id uint       New paper code ID
  -h, --help               help for edit
      --id uint            Past paper ID (required)
      --name string        New name
      --series-id uint     New paper series ID
      --year int           New year
```
